meta.description: Currency converter (supports multiple fiat rate sources and crypto)
command.description.bc: Convert currencies (multiple fiat rate sources + crypto)
command.help.bc:
/bc [Amount] [Currency_From] [Currency_To] - Convert currencies (fiat supports multiple rate sources: EU/UnionPay/Mastercard/Visa)
Inline: @NachoNekoX_bot bc [Amount] [Currency_From] [Currency_To]
error.amount_invalid: The amount must be a valid number
inline.usage_text:
Usage: bc <amount> <currency_from> <currency_to>
Example: bc 100 USD EUR
prompt.bc_usage:
Usage: /bc <amount> <currency_from> <currency_to>
Example: /bc 100 USD EUR - convert 100 USD to EUR
Example: /bc 1 BTC USD - convert 1 BTC to USD
Example: /bc 0.5 ETH BTC - convert 0.5 ETH to BTC
